meanings.meaning: 斯堪的纳维亚的；北欧国家的
meanings.usage: 用于描述北欧地区的国家或文化
形容政策、制度等具有先进性和人性化
强调事物逐渐演变发展的过程

meanings.meaning: 高压的；专横的；盛气凌人的
meanings.usage: 形容滥用权力、傲慢的行为方式
形容在工作或职责上不能胜任的人
表示采取措施保护某人或某物免受伤害
指个人对不公正待遇的申诉或投诉

meanings.meaning: 巡视官；调查官；申诉专员
meanings.usage: 指负责调查公民对政府官员投诉的官员

meanings.meaning: 过于热心的；过分积极的
meanings.usage: 形容做事过于热情而可能出错
指权威人士对下属的正式责备
指通过调查或研究来发现事实真相
形容对某事物持有不公平的先入为主的看法
指通过法律程序对某人提起诉讼
形容行动迅速、毫不拖延的
指正式向有关部门提交投诉或申诉

phrases.usage: 为了公共利益；符合公众利益

examples.en: The minister acted in the public interest.
examples.zh: 部长为了公共利益行事。

phrases.usage: 逐步形成一套优秀的体制

examples.en: Sweden has evolved an excellent system for protecting citizens.
examples.zh: 瑞典逐步形成了一套优秀的保护公民的体制。

examples.en: The system protects the individual citizen from incompetent officials.
examples.zh: 该体制保护个人公民免受不称职官员的侵害。

phrases.usage: 保护...的利益；维护...的利益

examples.en: The scheme was introduced to safeguard the interest of the individual.
examples.zh: 该方案的出台是为了保护个人的利益。

examples.en: The Ombudsman is not subject to political pressure.
examples.zh: 巡视官不受政治压力的影响。

phrases.usage: 代表某人采取行动；代理

examples.en: If a citizen's complaint is justified, the Ombudsman will act on his behalf.
examples.zh: 如果公民的投诉是合理的，巡视官将代表他采取行动。

examples.en: If any further complaints are lodged against him, he will be prosecuted.
examples.zh: 如果再有人对他提出投诉，他将受到起诉。

examples.en: The Ombudsman's prompt action put an end to an unpleasant practice.
examples.zh: 巡视官的迅速行动结束了一种不良做法。

examples.en: A policeman had dealt roughly with foreigners on several occasions.
examples.zh: 一名警察多次粗暴对待外国人。

phrases.usage: 公开接受公众检查；可供公众查阅

examples.en: There is nothing secretive about the Ombudsman's work, for his correspondence is open to public inspection.
examples.zh: 巡视官的工作没有任何秘密，因为他的信函可供公众查阅。

grammar.title: 现在完成时的被动语态 (Present Perfect Passive)
grammar.definition: 现在完成时被动语态表示过去发生的动作对现在造成的影响，或动作持续到现在，且主语是动作的承受者。
grammar.usage: 用于描述某个动作或过程的结果，强调其对现在的影响。文中描述瑞典的体制被其他国家采用这一结果。

examples.en: The system has worked so well that it has been adopted in other countries too.
examples.zh: 该体制运行良好，其他国家也采用了这一体制。

examples.en: The Swedish Parliament introduced a scheme in 1809.
examples.zh: 瑞典议会在1809年推出了一个方案。

grammar.title: 过去分词作定语 (Past Participle as Attribute)
grammar.definition: 过去分词作定语时，放在被修饰的名词之前或之后，表示被动和完成的意义。
grammar.structure: 名词 + 过去分词 / 过去分词 + 名词
grammar.usage: 用于简化定语从句，使句子更加简洁。常用于正式书面语中。

examples.en: A parliamentary committee representing all political parties appoints a person.
examples.zh: 一个代表所有政党的议会委员会任命一人。

examples.en: The official title of the person is 'Justiteombudsman'.
examples.zh: 这个人的官方头衔是'司法特派员'。

grammar.title: so...that 结果状语从句
grammar.definition: so后面接形容词或副词，that引导结果状语从句，表示'如此...以至于...'。
grammar.structure: so + 形容词/副词 + that + 结果状语从句
grammar.usage: 用于表达某种程度导致的结果。在文中说明瑞典体制运行良好以至于被其他国家采纳。

examples.en: The system has worked so well that it has been adopted in other countries too.
examples.zh: 该体制运行良好，其他国家也采用了。

examples.en: He is so busy that he cannot come.

sentencePatterns.pattern: The system has worked so well that...

original.en: The system has worked so well that it has been adopted in other countries too.
original.zh: 该体制运行良好，其他国家也采用了这一体制。

imitations.en: The policy has worked so well that it has become a model for other countries.
imitations.zh: 这项政策运行良好，已成为其他国家的典范。

imitations.en: The new teaching method has worked so well that it has been推广 in all schools.
imitations.zh: 新的教学方法效果良好，已在所有学校推广。

sentencePatterns.pattern: As long ago as + 年份, ... + 一般过去时

original.en: As long ago as 1809, the Swedish Parliament introduced a scheme to safeguard the interest of the individual.
original.zh: 早在1809年，瑞典议会就推出了保护个人利益的方案。

imitations.en: As long ago as 1990, China began its reform and opening-up policy.
imitations.zh: 早在1990年，中国就开始了改革开放政策。

imitations.en: As long ago as 1950, scientists discovered this phenomenon.
imitations.zh: 早在1950年，科学家们就发现了这一现象。

original.en: There is nothing secretive about the Ombudsman's work, for his correspondence is open to public inspection.
original.zh: 巡视官的工作没有任何秘密，因为他的信函可供公众查阅。

imitations.en: There is nothing secretive about the government's decision.
imitations.zh: 政府的这项决定没有任何秘密。

imitations.en: There is nothing secretive about our company's financial report.
imitations.zh: 我们公司的财务报告没有任何隐瞒。

sentencePatterns.pattern: The action he takes varies according to...

original.en: The action he takes varies according to the nature of the complaint.
original.zh: 他采取的行动因投诉的性质而异。

imitations.en: The punishment varies according to the seriousness of the crime.
imitations.zh: 惩罚的轻重取决于犯罪的严重程度。

imitations.en: The salary varies according to qualifications and experience.
imitations.zh: 工资根据资历和经验而有所不同。
